title: Operation
text: Operation Operations for the current component. To add operations to the component signature, click the + button adjacent to the Details of Operation field. The naming rules for operations are: Maximum length of 32 characters. Valid characters are A-Z, 0-9, and underscore (_). The first character must be a letter. Note: If you add an operation here, you must also define it in the Operations trigger of the current component using the Trigger Editor. To edit operation implementations, click the >> button adjacent to the Details of Operation field. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
